name: bibarel
flavor_texts: It makes its nest by damming streams with bark and mud. It is known as an industrious worker.
While its movements out of water are sluggish, it can swim as fast as any FEEBAS.
A river dammed by BIBAREL will never overflow its banks, which is appreciated by people nearby.
It busily makes its nest with stacks of branches and roots it has cut up with its sharp incisors.
A river dammed by Bibarel will never overflow its banks, which is appreciated by people nearby.
Bibarel fur repels water and is also a fantastic material for heat retention. These Pokémon create dams on rivers to live in.
text: Bibarel is the Beaver Pokémon. It is a normal and water-type Pokémon. Abilities: simple, unaware, moody (hidden). Base stats — HP: 79, Attack: 85, Defense: 60, Sp. Atk: 55, Sp. Def: 60, Speed: 71. Evolution line: bidoof → bibarel. Lore: It makes its nest by damming streams with bark and mud. It is known as an industrious worker. While its movements out of water are sluggish, it can swim as fast as any FEEBAS. A river dammed by BIBAREL will never overflow its banks, which is appreciated by people nearby. It busily makes its nest with stacks of branches and roots it has cut up with its sharp incisors. A river dammed by Bibarel will never overflow its banks, which is appreciated by people nearby.
